mapper.sql: id, permission_name, permission_code, permission_url, is_enable, create_time
mapper.insert:
insert into permission_info
id,
permission_name,
permission_code,
permission_url,
is_enable,
create_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{permissionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{permissionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{permissionUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isEnable,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update permission_info
permission_name = #{permissionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
permission_code = #{permissionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
permission_url = #{permissionUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_enable = #{isEnable,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update permission_info set permission_name = #{permissionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, permission_code = #{permissionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, permission_url = #{permissionUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_enable = #{isEnable,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select pmi.* from permission_info pmi LEFT JOIN role_permission up ON pmi.id = up.permission_id LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON ur.role_id = up.role_id LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON ui.id = ur.user_id where ui.user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT pi.* FROM permission_info pi LEFT JOIN role_permission rp ON pi.id = rp.permission_id LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY pi.id
